sections.paragraph: an unused root, prob. i.q. קָלָה to roast, to parch; since verbs לה֞ very often accord with verbs לח֞, as קָשָׁה and קָשַׁח, פָּתָה and פָּתַח, פָּצָה and פָּצַח, כָּלַח and כָּלָה, סָפַח and סָפָה, פָּלָה and פָּלַח, on the reason of which interchange, see Heb. Gram. § 74, note 4. [In Thes. this is regarded as cognate to the verb צָלַח No. II.] Hence-
